title: The watching Horrors
description: This texture pack adds faces into the broken script mod made by :wendigodrip:, of course it needs the broken script to function, Although this mod does not add entities peeking from corners since this is EDITED in the video editing. Needs geckolib.
body: This texture pack just adds simple faces into the broken script, iit needs the broken script to function of course, needs geckolib too. This mod does NOT add faces peeking from the corners since they are edit.
